title: RumourEval Stance and Verification
description: Annotate social media posts for rumour stance classification and thread structure analysis based on the RumourEval 2019 shared task. Annotators classify responses as supporting, denying, querying, or commenting on rumour claims.
citation:

  booktitle = "Proceedings of the 13th International Workshop on Semantic Evaluation",
  month = jun,
  year = "2019",
  address = "Minneapolis, Minnesota, USA",
